title: Organize Boards Alphabetically in Folders
excerpt: HI all! Is there a way to organize boards within folders alphabetically? It seems like such an easy win and would make organization so much easier. At this point, I keep having to drag/drop so things stay in alpha order. …

posts.author: NJE44 (Elizabeth K Coccia)
posts.cookedHtml:
HI all! Is there a way to organize boards within folders alphabetically? It seems like such an easy win and would make organization so much easier. At this point, I keep having to drag/drop so things stay in alpha order.
Any tips? Am I totally missing something obvious?

Similarly ordering folders in alpha order

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Feature requests

Submit your product ideas and feedback, tell us about your dream features, and vote to be heard!

I don’t know of a way, but maybe check the feature request section and if it’s not already there, request it?

posts.author: drtanvisachar (Dr. Tanvi Sachar- Certified Monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @NJE44
You’re not missing anything obvious here At the moment, monday doesn’t support automatic alphabetical sorting for boards or folders. The order is fully manual, so drag and drop is currently the only way to keep things in alpha order.

A couple of light workarounds that help in practice are using consistent naming conventions like prefixes or numbers so boards naturally group together, or creating a simple “index” board or dashboard with links to your most important boards.

This is also a pretty common request, so it’s worth submitting as a feature request.

Dr. Tanvi Sachar
Monday Certified Partner, Monday Wizard
